name: todd-w-shaffer
description: Claude Code plugins by Todd Shaffer

plugins.name: coolant
plugins.description: Thermal management for Claude Code — caps test runner concurrency, suppresses build tools during parallel mode

plugins.name: excavate
plugins.description: Code archaeology — reconstruct the why behind a file, symbol, or commit by reading git history, commit bodies, and CLAUDE.md/README evolution. Pairs with LSP plugins.
